Caption: Dimensionless bubble displacement from the equilibrium radius (X = R/Ro − 1) vs dimensionless time (τ) for 9.94 × 10−4 m air bubbles, void fraction β = 3.77 × 10−4, driven by an acoustic field with a dimensionless pressure amplitude P′=1x10−4 during the first 3 consecutive periods at a frequency of 1000 Hz. po = 108,937 Pa, .
